commands.review_summary:
The PR changes skills prompt path compaction so paths under the resolved OpenClaw config/state root stay absolute, with a regression test for the AlphaClaw-style managed skill path case.

PR surface: Source +13, Tests +27. Total +40 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is high confidence: current main compacts managed skill prompt paths to ~/... while the read helper expands ~/ with os.homedir(), and the linked issue supplies live AlphaClaw before logs. I did not run the exact live Telegram/Docker loop in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the PR is a live-workflow bug fix but still lacks after-fix real runtime proof and needs maintainer product acceptance of the prompt path contract.
